agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing aromatic substitutions at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions a

report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic substitutions at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions with ECL2 and TM5 while reducing off-target affinity to SSTR3/5.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is generating strong binders but not sufficiently di

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is generating strong binders but not sufficiently differentiating SSTR2 from other SSTR subtypes. The focus must shift to explicit disruption of conserved off-target interactions at non-pharmacophore positions.

proposed_changes.rationale: To improve selectivity, we must disrupt conserved pocket interactions in off-targets SSTR3/SSTR5. These positions are non-pharmacophore and can be mutated to reduce off-target binding while preserving the core pharmacophore.
These mutations are designed to break hydrogen bonds and hydrophobic interactions in SSTR3/SSTR5 pockets while preserving the overall scaffold and pharmacophore at positions 7-10 and Cys3/Cys14.
